summary: Audio pitch detection app with visual note/frequency display
architectural_notes: UI displays detected notes and frequencies from ambient sound
App has a 'lock key' feature to freeze the detected key
Note/frequency display fields must maintain consistent height to prevent layout shift
known_issues: Note/frequency fields cause vertical layout shift when values change or are empty
Chord charts and scales do not display when the key is set manually or locked in

existing_features.title: Modify the PitchDisplay component to always render a fixed-height placeholder (e.g., '—' or '0') for the note field when no note is detected, preventing the field from being empty
Modify the PitchDisplay component to always render a fixed-height placeholder (e.g., '—' or '0 Hz') for the frequency field when no frequency is detected, preventing the field from being empty

Ensure the PitchDisplay component maintains consistent vertical spacing and positioning regardless of whether note/frequency values are detected or placeholders are shown, even after the key has been locked in

Review and verify the PitchDisplay component implementation to ensure fixed-height placeholders ('—' for note, '0 Hz' for frequency) are correctly applied when no pitch is detected, preventing any layout shifts
Resolve any syntax errors, type mismatches, or missing imports that may have caused the previous deployment failure
Successfully build and deploy the application to the Internet Computer

Ensure that when a key is set manually via the KeySelector component, the TheoryPanel component receives and correctly renders the selected key's chord progressions, scales, and other music theory content.

Ensure that when the key is auto-detected and locked in via the AudioAnalyzer component, the TheoryPanel component receives the locked key and correctly renders its chord progressions, scales, and music theory content.

Audit the data flow between MusicTheoryApp, KeySelector, AudioAnalyzer, and TheoryPanel to identify and fix any state management issues (e.g., incorrect prop passing, stale state, missing re-renders, or query key mismatches) that prevent the TheoryPanel from receiving and displaying the active key's music theory data.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix chord charts and scales not displaying when key is set manually or locked in
